summary: Control Panel view model added, wired into PR rendering; metadata plumbing and workflows updated; unit tests added and passing in CI.

requirement_checks.requirement: Every factory-managed PR shows a stable 'Factory Control Panel' section in a single canonical location.
evidence: scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs: renderPrBody builds a 'CONTROL_PANEL_SECTION' and inserts a '## Factory Control Panel' section into the PR body (see renderPrBody variables and CONTROL_PANEL_SECTION usage).
tests/github-messages.test.mjs: 'renderPrBody renders control panel for plan_ready status' asserts presence of '## Factory Control Panel' and the required fields.
tests/control-panel.test.mjs: unit tests validate control-panel serialization and action lines used by the PR body renderer.

requirement_checks.requirement: The control panel updates as the PR moves through plan_ready, implementing, repairing, reviewing, ready_for_review, blocked, and paused states.
evidence: scripts/lib/control-panel.mjs: view model implements state overlay for paused label, maps FACTORY_PR_STATUSES to display text, reason, actions and artifacts.
tests/control-panel.test.mjs: tests cover 'paused overlay', 'blocked reasons', 'ready_for_review state', and 'latest run and artifact links' ensuring the view model responds to those states.
CI: unit tests passed (workflow run id: 23350202423, 'unit: success').

requirement_checks.requirement: The panel includes fields: State, Waiting on, Last completed stage, Reason, Recommended next step, and Actions.
evidence: scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs: controlPanelSection assembly includes '**State:**', '**Waiting on:**', '**Last completed stage:**', '**Reason:**', '**Recommended next step:**', '**Latest run:**', '**Artifacts:**', and '**Actions**'.
tests/github-messages.test.mjs: assertions check those fields appear in the rendered PR body for plan_ready status.

requirement_checks.requirement: Add control-panel.mjs view model and wire into PR body rendering and metadata plumbing.
evidence: scripts/lib/control-panel.mjs: new view-model file implementing the control panel logic.
scripts/lib/github-messages.mjs: imports and uses buildControlPanel in renderPrBody.
scripts/apply-pr-state.mjs and scripts/finalize-plan.mjs: updated to set and pass new metadata fields (lastCompletedStage, lastRunId, lastRunUrl, pauseReason) used by the panel.

requirement_checks.requirement: Update workflows to persist metadata fields consumed by the control panel (e.g., last run id/url, last completed stage, pause reason).
evidence: .github/workflows/factory-pr-loop.yml: writes FACTORY_LAST_RUN_ID, FACTORY_LAST_RUN_URL, and FACTORY_LAST_COMPLETED_STAGE into apply-pr-state steps (see workflow env usage).
.github/workflows/factory-control-action.yml: uses FACTORY_LAST_COMPLETED_STAGE and FACTORY_PAUSE_REASON inputs/outputs for control action wiring.
scripts/apply-pr-state.mjs: new applyLastRunId/applyLastRunUrl/applyPauseReason handlers accept the env vars and merge them into the metadata written to the PR body.

requirement_checks.requirement: Automated tests cover the control panel states, action links, artifact/run link rendering, and template override behavior.
evidence: tests/control-panel.test.mjs: exercises paused overlay, blocked subtype actions/reasons, ready_for_review behavior, and link generation.
tests/github-messages.test.mjs: covers template overrides, cost lines, and control-panel action lines including presence and encoded workflow dispatch params.
CI: unit workflow passed (unit: success) — run id 23350202423.

requirement_checks.requirement: Preserve existing human review gate for merges and do not change the underlying state machine behavior (panel overlays paused state but doesn't alter metadata-driven status transitions).
evidence: spec.md: describes the overlay behavior (paused label overlays display without changing metadata status).
scripts/apply-pr-state.mjs: when labels include 'factory:paused' the code leaves metadata.status unchanged and renderPrBody overlays display via buildControlPanel.
README.md: reiterates that human review remains the merge gate and workflow protections must be set separately.

findings.title: Operator dispatch permissions and integration tests
findings.details: The control panel emits workflow_dispatch URLs for mutation actions and a corresponding workflow file (.github/workflows/factory-control-action.yml) exists. There are no end-to-end tests that validate dispatch permission or the side-effects of mutation actions.
findings.recommendation: Add an operator-facing doc snippet that lists required Actions permissions and consider an integration smoke test (manual or CI job) that verifies the control-action invocation flow and required tokens/permissions.

findings.title: Consider screenshot or example in operator docs
findings.details: README mentions the control panel and the control action workflow; adding a small rendered example would help new operators onboard faster.
findings.recommendation: Add a short screenshot or markdown example showing the 'Factory Control Panel' section and clarifying mutation vs informational actions.
